About Parmod Electricals

Your Complete Electrical Solution Partner

Parmod Electricals is a trusted name in electrical turnkey projects, repair & maintenance, and custom panel manufacturing, headquartered in Faridabad, Haryana.

We serve factories, industries, and commercial establishments across Pan India — delivering end-to-end electrical turnkey solutions, repair & maintenance services, and custom panel manufacturing, all under one roof.

"From electrical turnkey projects to repair & maintenance — we power your progress with precision, reliability, and certified expertise across Pan India."

ISO Certified

Quality standards you can rely on

24/7 Emergency

Always available when it matters

Custom Solutions

Tailored to your exact needs

Pan India Delivery

Serving clients nationwide

On-Time Completion

Deadlines respected, always

Licensed Team

Certified electricians only

What We Do

Our Services

Specializing in electrical turnkey projects, repair & maintenance, and panel manufacturing for industrial and commercial needs.

Electrical Turnkey Projects

End-to-end electrical solutions from design to commissioning — LT/HT panels, substations, cabling, and full infrastructure.

View Projects

Industrial Wiring & Installation

Complete electrical wiring, cable laying, and installation for factories and manufacturing plants with full safety compliance.

Enquire Now

Commercial Wiring & Installation

Reliable electrical installations for offices, malls, and corporate establishments.

Enquire Now

Residential Wiring

Safe, neat, and efficient electrical wiring for residential complexes and housing projects.

Enquire Now

Cable Tray & Busbar Systems

Supply and installation of perforated cable trays, ladder type, raceways, and busbar ducting systems.

Enquire Now

Repair & Maintenance

Electrical breakdown repairs, preventive maintenance, troubleshooting, and 24/7 emergency support for all industrial systems.

Get Support

HT/LT Substation Work

Transformer installation, substation erection, HT panel commissioning, and high-voltage system maintenance.

Enquire Now

Custom Panel Manufacturing

Bespoke MCC, PCC, APFC, VFD, and distribution panels built to your exact specifications and IS standards.

View Panels
Our Products

Custom Electrical Panels

Manufactured to IS/IEC standards with precision engineering for all industrial needs.

MCC Panels

Motor Control Centres for managing and protecting motors in industrial applications.

Most Popular

PCC Panels

Power Control Centres for main power distribution in large industrial setups.

APFC Panels

Automatic Power Factor Correction panels to improve power factor and reduce energy costs.

VFD Panels

Variable Frequency Drive panels for precise motor speed control and energy efficiency.

DB / Distribution Boards

Main and sub-distribution boards for safe and efficient power distribution.

Control & Relay Panels

Custom control and protection relay panels for automation and safety systems.

DG Sync Panels

Auto/manual synchronising panels for parallel operation of DG sets — ensuring seamless load sharing and power continuity.

Speciality
Trading

Wires & Cables

We supply premium wires, cables, cable trays and earthing materials from India's most trusted brands.

Power Cables

LT & HT power cables for industrial and infrastructure projects from leading brands.

Control Cables

Multi-core control cables for signalling, instrumentation, and automation systems.

Flexible Cables

Flexible, durable cables for motors, machines, and heavy-duty industrial use.

Armoured Cables

Steel wire armoured cables for underground and outdoor heavy-duty applications.

Cable Trays

Perforated, ladder & raceways cable trays in GI, stainless steel & PVC for organised cable management in industrial installations.

Earthing Materials

Complete earthing solutions — GI/copper earth pits, earthing electrodes, strips, compounds & accessories for safe electrical grounding.

Why Choose Us

Why Parmod Electricals?

We combine decades of expertise with modern technology to deliver unmatched electrical solutions.

ISO Certified Quality

Every project meets strict ISO quality standards — from materials to workmanship.

24/7 Emergency Service

Our team is always on standby. Electrical emergencies get resolved fast, any time.

Pan India Delivery

We execute and deliver projects across the length and breadth of India.

On-Time Completion

We commit to timelines and deliver every project on schedule — no exceptions.
